WildFireworksPayoutAndRulesShared.Payout1_1Rules1_8: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
WildFireworksPayoutAndRulesShared.Payout1_2Rules1_9: Wild symbols appears on reels 3, 4 and 5 only.
WildFireworksPayoutAndRulesShared.Payout2_1Rules2_1: All Wild symbols appears in stacks during any spin.
WildFireworksPayoutAndRulesShared.Payout2_2Rules2_2: When there is a symbol win with Wild symbol involved, all wins for that symbol is multiplied by x2.
WildFireworksPayoutAndRulesShared.Payout3_1Rules3_1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
WildFireworksPayoutAndRulesShared.Payout3_3Rules3_3: At the start of every free spin, any stacked Wild symbols that appears halfway on the reels will be nudged in fully.
WildFireworksPayoutAndRulesShared.Payout3_4Rules3_4: At the end of every free spin, any Wild symbols that is left on the reels will stay on the reels until it is involved in a win.
WildFireworksPayoutAndRulesShared.Payout4_5Rules1_15: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.

WildFireworksPayout.Payout4_6: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.

WildFireworksRules.Rules1: Wild Fireworks is a 5-reel, 3-row video slot featuring stacked Wild symbols and free spins with sticky Wild symbols.

Rules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for 243 ways (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
Rules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 243 ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

WildFireworksRules.Rules4: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
WildFireworksRules.Rules5: Scatter symbol does not appear during Free Spins Feature.
